comment: deterministic ed25519 signing test vectors. every sdk/router MUST pass these.

cases.name: pyth_price_get_minimal
cases.canonical_body:
402proto/0.1
provider=pyth.oracle
method=price.get
price=0.001
currency=USDC
recipient=7xKpRECIPxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx
chain=solana-mainnet
quote_id=q_test_01

verification_notes: the signature column is recomputed at test time from secret_key + canonical_body and compared.
if your implementation produces a different signature for the same body, your canonical body builder is non-conformant.
do not test for signature bytes equality across libraries; ed25519 deterministic signatures should match exactly across nacl, dalek, noble.
